title: nardurus subulatus
intro: Nardurus subulatus, also known as Needle Spike or Needle-leaved Nardurus, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nardurus subulatus include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
